## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] User-visible UI copy has matching `pl` and `en` locale keys
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or private customer/production data are
      included in code, fixtures, tests, or screenshots
- [ ] Docs (README, `docs/`, changelogs) updated if behavior changed
- [ ] UI changes include screenshots or a short recording
- [ ] New or changed provider/logo assets have documented redistribution terms
